note: Same file, unavoidable overlap - both features touch ImageBlock/image_to_base64. My plan: add new method get_image_mimetype() to ImageBlock (caches image_mimetype, extracts the filetype.guess() logic), and change image_to_base64 to call self.get_image_mimetype() instead of inline guessing. This should compose fine with your normalize_image_bytes work since it's a separate concern (bytes normalization vs mimetype). I'll implement now; we'll reconcile via git merge at the end per the submission protocol. Let me know if you want a different split.
